name: jKanban

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing three-column DOM when you need lightweight vanilla Kanban column/card dragging and initialization from compact boards JSON, because native implementations fail at cross-column drops, touch interaction, and column-order maintenance; not for project persistence, WIP rules, or an automation platform.
en.why_valuable: AI can render only a static Kanban board by default, not reliable card moves across columns, column dragging, and mobile interaction; jKanban uses its boards hierarchy and built-in Dragula to provide minimal viable direct manipulation.

data_in.note: data_in.boards maps columns to cards; every board id and item id must be globally unique. Upstream writes title as HTML, so the consuming AI must escape untrusted text first.

boards.id: string -- unique across the Kanban board
boards.title: string -- trusted title HTML
boards.dragTo?: string[] -- board ids that may receive cards; unrestricted by default

item.id: string -- unique across the Kanban board
item.title: string -- trusted card HTML
item.<customKey>?: string|number|boolean -- none by default; emitted as a data-* attribute

when_to_use: 需要轻量 vanilla 看板的列/卡片拖拽和紧凑 boards JSON 初始化时用它而非手写三列 DOM,因为原生在跨列投放、触摸交互和列顺序维护上失败;非做项目持久化、WIP 规则或自动化平台。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能渲染静态看板,做不到可靠的拖卡换列、拖列与移动端交互;jKanban 用 boards 层级和内置 Dragula 完成最小可用直接操纵。

data_in.note: data_in.boards 映射列→卡片;所有 board id 与 item id 必须全局唯一。title 被上游当 HTML 写入,不可信文本须由消费 AI 先转义。

boards.title: string —— 可信标题 HTML
boards.class?: string —— 逗号分隔 header class,默认 ''
boards.bodyClass?: string —— 逗号分隔 body class,默认 ''
boards.dragTo?: string[] —— 允许卡片进入的 board id;默认不限制

item.title: string —— 可信卡片 HTML
item.<customKey>?: string|number|boolean —— 默认无;写成 data-* 属性

boot.widget: unsupported: jKanban 1.3.1 把 options.element 强制传给 document.querySelector,无法定位 shadowRoot 内挂载点;不把元素逃到 light DOM,也不把 CSS 注入 document.head。

example._why: boards 的 class 类型与 item.class 类型不同且 title 是 HTML 字符串,minimal 用两列一卡钉死层级。

uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;1.3.1 无整板 serializer,消费 AI 须从 .kanban-board[data-id] 与卡片 data-eid 的当前 DOM 顺序重建 boards JSON,再做下载或复制兜底。
uplink.widget: unsupported:原生挂载无法进入 shadow,因此无 widget 上行分支。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 从当前 DOM 顺序重建 boards JSON 后调用 sendFollowUpMessage;本条不绑定统一回调。

carriers.widget: unsupported:options.element 内部固定 document.querySelector(selector),shadowRoot 查询边界不可达
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN 会带入 Dragula,官方 CSS 进 iframe document.head

isolation.evidence: 库不向 document.head 注 CSS(源码无 link/head 注入),jkanban.min.css 由 boot 手动加载。boards 构建进 options.element 解析出的容器,不向 body 追加 modal/tooltip。globalEvents=yes:内置 Dragula 在 document.documentElement 上绑 mousemove/mouseup/touchmove(源码 859/920/1288/1354 行),1.3.1 无干净 destroy。shadowCompatible=no:源码 466 行 self.element=document.querySelector(self.options.element) 用全局 document 查询,无法定位 shadowRoot 内挂载点(carriers.widget=unsupported 属实)。
